problem: Can protein structure be predicted from sequence in real time without AlphaFold compute cost?
mechanism: Optical neural network for speed-of-light inference
hypothesis: Optical neural network for speed-of-light inference may resolve Can protein structure be predicted from sequence in real time without AlphaFold compute cost? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Benchmark on standard dataset with 10 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
